---
title: "Antoine Boulet"
about:
  template: jolla          # ou trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
  image: /assets/profile_picture.jpg
  links:
    #- text: "{{< ai cv >}}"
    #- text: "{{< fa at >}}"
    #  href: mailto:antoine.boulet+website@protonmail.com
    #- text: "{{< fa graduation-cap >}}"
    #- text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
    #  href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3839-6090
    #geo-alt
    - text: "research (en)"
      href: en/research/index.qmd
    - text: "recherche (fr)"
      href: fr/recherche/index.qmd
    - text: "teaching (en)"
      href: en/teaching/index.qmd
    - text: "enseignement (fr)"
      href: fr/enseignement/index.qmd
navbar: false
---

Un badge de type success: [success]{.card}

[FR](../fr/about/index.html)
[EN](../en/about/index.html)

INDEX MAIN
